title: AGENTOBS PromptPayload
description: RFC-0001 §7.2 — Payload for prompt lifecycle events in the llm.prompt.* namespace. Tracks template loading, variable rendering, and version changes without storing raw prompt content (§20.4 data minimisation). Three event types: llm.prompt.rendered (a template was instantiated with variables), llm.prompt.template.loaded (a template was fetched from the registry), llm.prompt.version.changed (the active template version was updated).

PromptRenderedPayload.title: PromptRenderedPayload
PromptRenderedPayload.description: Payload for llm.prompt.rendered — a prompt template was instantiated with variable values, producing a rendered prompt string.

template_id.description: Unique identifier for the prompt template.

version.description: Version of the template that was rendered.

rendered_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the fully rendered prompt string. Enables deduplication and regression detection without storing prompt content.

variable_count.description: Number of template variables that were bound during rendering.

variable_names.description: Names of variables bound during rendering (values themselves MUST NOT be stored unless non-sensitive).

char_count.description: Character length of the rendered prompt string.

token_estimate.description: Estimated token count for the rendered prompt (pre-tokenisation estimate).

language.description: Primary language of the rendered prompt (BCP-47 language tag).

span_id.description: Links this prompt event to the span that consumed the rendered prompt.

PromptTemplateLoadedPayload.title: PromptTemplateLoadedPayload
PromptTemplateLoadedPayload.description: Payload for llm.prompt.template.loaded — a prompt template was fetched from a template registry or storage system.

template_id.description: Unique identifier for the prompt template.

version.description: Version of the template that was loaded.

source.description: Storage system from which the template was loaded.

template_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the template content at rest. Enables tamper detection of the template itself.

load_duration_ms.description: Time taken to load the template in milliseconds.

cache_hit.description: Whether the template was served from an in-process cache.

PromptVersionChangedPayload.title: PromptVersionChangedPayload
PromptVersionChangedPayload.description: Payload for llm.prompt.version.changed — the active version of a prompt template was updated, indicating a prompt engineering change going live.

template_id.description: Unique identifier for the prompt template that had its version changed.

previous_version.description: Version that was active before the change.

new_version.description: Version that became active after the change.

change_reason.description: Human-readable rationale for the version change.
examples: Improved instruction clarity for tool-use scenarios

changed_by.description: Actor that triggered the version change.

previous_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous template version.

new_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the new template version.
